title: V-Dem electoral democracy index direction
description: Forecast whether a country's V-Dem electoral democracy index will be higher at a later year than at the as_of year.
question_template: As of {as_of_year}, will {target}'s V-Dem electoral democracy index be higher in {resolution_year} than in {as_of_year}?
limitations: Uses structured V-Dem rows from data/processed/countries/{target}/metrics.v1.json. Validate metric year fields before high-stakes replay; some transformed rows may include long historical series.
